design_system.name: E1 Crystal Space Glass System

rules.headings: Use tracking-tight for H1/H2, tracking-normal for smaller headings. Do not use Inter or generic sans.

glass.tier_3_elevated: bg-white/[0.15] backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/20 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] backdrop-saturate-150

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. Allow the WebGL shader to breathe and be visible.
layout_and_spacing.cards: Use p-6 or p-8 inside glass cards.
layout_and_spacing.grid: Bento style. gap-6 or gap-8. Do not fill 100% of the screen seamlessly, leave gaps for the background to show through.

sidebar.instructions: Ensure it is not opaque black. The webGL shader must show through.

header_topbar.classes: bg-white/[0.1] backdrop-blur-2xl border-b border-white/10 sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-saturate-150 text-white
header_topbar.instructions: Use Crystal Glass effect. Must not be opaque.

cards.classes: bg-white/[0.08] backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.3)] rounded-xl text-white
cards.instructions: Apply Tier 2 glass to Dashboard Stat cards, Analytics containers, Landing page feature cards.

inputs.classes: bg-white/[0.05] backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 text-white placeholder:text-white/50 focus:border-teal-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-teal-500 rounded-md px-4 py-2

buttons.primary: bg-teal-500 hover:bg-teal-400 text-black font-bold rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white/[0.1] hover:bg-white/[0.15] backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 text-white rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-all

message_bubbles.outbound: bg-teal-500 text-black rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm px-4 py-2
message_bubbles.inbound: bg-white/[0.1] backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 text-white rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm px-4 py-2

kanban.column: bg-white/[0.02] backdrop-blur-sm border border-white/5 rounded-xl p-4
kanban.card: bg-white/[0.08] backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-lg rounded-lg p-4 cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing hover:bg-white/[0.12] transition-colors text-white

landing_page.hero_card: bg-white/[0.08] backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/15 shadow-2xl rounded-2xl p-8 backdrop-saturate-150
landing_page.pricing_card: bg-white/[0.08] backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 hover:border-teal-500/50 transition-colors shadow-xl rounded-2xl p-8 text-white

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

images.description: Complementary 3D glass shapes for landing page or decorative backgrounds

instructions_to_main_agent: Remove any 'bg-black', 'bg-slate-900', or other opaque backgrounds from standard layouts, sidebars, headers, and cards so the z-index -10 WebGL shader can show through entirely.
Apply the specific Tier 1, 2, and 3 glassmorphism classes to all UI panels. The entire UI must feel like floating glass.
Use the primary teal color sparingly for call to actions only.
Retain Georgia for headings and Times New Roman for body text, maintaining the editorial aesthetic.
Add data-testid attributes to all buttons, links, inputs, and interactive components.
Do not use placeholder image URLs. Use the provided images from the 'media' object.
